title: AI Readiness in African Public Sector
abstract: Comprehensive snapshot of AI policy adoption and implementation readiness across 12 African countries, examining regulatory frameworks, infrastructure gaps, and capacity building initiatives.

title: State of Data Protection in East Africa 2024
abstract: Annual report analyzing data protection legislation implementation across East African Community member states, highlighting enforcement challenges and cross-border data flow issues.

title: Cybersecurity Capacity Building: A Pan-African Approach
abstract: Strategic recommendations for developing cybersecurity talent pipelines, establishing regional training centers, and fostering public-private partnerships across the continent.

title: Digital Identity Systems: African Case Studies
abstract: Comparative analysis of digital identity initiatives in Ghana, Rwanda, and Morocco, examining privacy safeguards, inclusion strategies, and interoperability standards.

title: Telecommunications Regulation in the 5G Era
abstract: Analysis of regulatory adaptations needed for 5G deployment across Africa, addressing spectrum management, infrastructure sharing, and security considerations.

title: E-Government Services: Accessibility and Adoption
abstract: Study on barriers to e-government adoption in rural and underserved communities, with recommendations for improving digital literacy and service design.

title: Cybercrime Trends in West Africa 2024
abstract: Annual cybercrime threat landscape report covering financial fraud, phishing campaigns, ransomware incidents, and coordinated law enforcement responses.

title: Blockchain for Public Service Delivery
abstract: Exploration of blockchain technology applications in land registry, health records, and supply chain transparency, with pilot program results from three countries.

title: Regional Cybersecurity Cooperation Frameworks
abstract: Assessment of existing regional cooperation mechanisms (AU, ECOWAS, EAC, SADC) and proposals for strengthening information sharing and joint response capabilities.

title: Privacy by Design in African Context
abstract: Practical guide for implementing privacy-by-design principles in African tech startups and government digital services, with culturally-relevant examples.
